query: What are the latest developments in large language models?
final_report:
### Research Report: Latest Developments in Large Language Models
#### Summary
The latest developments in large language models (LLMs) have seen rapid evolution in both scale and application, with foundational models such as BERT and GPT leading to innovative applications in writing, translation, learning, and communication.

#### Key Findings
* Large language models are increasingly shaping everyday life, assisting with tasks such as writing, translation, and learning.
* Recent years have seen significant progress in LLMs, with 2025 being a particularly eventful year for developments in the field.
* Various LLMs are available for businesses to derive valuable insights from large amounts of data, with over 30 notable models available in 2026.
* Ongoing research and development are addressing limitations and open problems in LLMs, with predictions for continued advancements in the field.

#### Sources
* https://link.springer.com/article/10.1007/s42452-025-07668-w
* https://winbuzzer.com/ai/models/large-language-models/
* https://www.nature.com/articles/s43588-025-00890-x
* https://magazine.sebastianraschka.com/p/state-of-llms-2025
* https://www.techtarget.com/WhatIs/feature/12-of-the-best-large-language-models
